description: Record how a node entered the graph: `authored` (the default, someone stated it) / `planned` / `inferred` (read back out of an existing system) / `healed` / `reconciled` / `imported`. Accepted on Requirement, Capability, Component and Interface. Mark inferred requirements as such — a requirement backed out of the code that implements it is satisfied by construction and cannot contradict anything, and a reader has no other way to tell. For bulk adoption prefer import_graph, which carries this at create time.
name: set_provenance
